1999 Zodiac Sign: Libra Blood Type: O Height: 157 cm (5’2″) Nationality: Japanese Instagram: @dokoh.ruriko Twitter: @Ruriko_FESTIVE TikTok: @ruriko_07 YouTube: Itokochanz.Ruriko Facts: — Her official color is Red. — She is from Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan. — Hobbies: Walking, doodling, shopping. — Special Skills: Detecting familiar smells, imitating Ikkokudou, having a flexible tongue. — Her nicknames are Rucchi (るっち), Ruri-chan (るりちゃん)— She joined the group on April 1, 2018. — She is a former member of Tokyo Cheer② Party.— She joined Tokyo Cheer② Party on September 29, 2013, and remained until their disbandment in 2017. — Her cousin is Hinari. — She hates insects. — She loves games. — In 2020, she was a member of the temporay unit Rukarina.Yagi Hinata  Stage Name: Yagi Hinata (八木ひなた) TikTok: @saekondo_inu SHOWROOM: 近藤沙瑛子Saeko Facts: — Her official color is Green. — She is from Kumamoto Prefecture, Japan. — She’s the shortest member. — Her nickname is Sae-chan (さえちゃん) — She was a Miss iD 2018 finalist. — She joined the group on April 1, 2018. — She is a dog lover. — Likes: Matcha — In October 2015, she was a member of photograph under the name Usaki Saeko (宇崎さえ子). — She graduated from FES☆TIVE on November 14, 2020. — Since 2021, she is a member of the idol group #BABABABAMBI.Takeuchi Saria  Stage Name: Takeuchi Saria (竹内さりあ) Birth Name: Mano Saria (真野彩里愛) Position: Vocalist, Dancer Birthday: June 7, 2000 Zodiac Sign: Gemini Blood Type: A Height: 155 cm (5’1”) Nationality: Japanese Instagram: @saria_takeuchi Twitter: @T_SARIA_0607 TikTok: @saria_t1 Saria Facts: — Her official color is White. — She is from Saitama Prefecture, Japan.— Her nickname is Saria (さりあ), Mano-chan (真野ちゃん), Otake (おたけ) — She joined the group on January 19, 2017. — Hobby: Binge eating, eating food available for a limited time. — Special Skills: Stretching her cheeks, table tennis, processing leftover food. — In January 2021, she changed her stage name from Mano Saria (真野彩里愛) to Takeuchi Saria (竹内さりあ). — She graduated from FES☆TIVE on September 29, 2021. — She currently works as an actress and a gravure model.Minami Marika  Stage Name: Minami Marika (南茉莉花) Birth Name: Minami Marika (南茉莉花) Position: Vocalist, Dancer Birthday: May 2, 1997 Zodiac Sign: Taurus Blood Type: B Height: 153 cm (5’0″) Nationality: Japanese Instagram: @marika_ramen Twitter: @Marika_m_52Marika Facts: — Her official color is Blue. — She is from Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan. — Hobbies: Ramen, watching movies. — Special Skills: Piano, baking cookies. — Her nicknames are Mariri (まりり), Marika (まりか) — She joined the group on April 1, 2018. — She is an AKB48 fan. — She is a quarter Indonesian. — She graduated from FES☆TIVE on August 31, 2022. — She currently works as a choreographer and a talent.Aoba Hinari Stage Name: Aoba Hinari (青葉ひなり) Birth Name: Hirayama Honoka (早山ほのか), but she legalized it to Aoba Hinari (青葉ひなり) Position: Vocalist, Dancer Birthday: January 19, 1996 Zodiac Sign: Capricorn Blood Type: O Height: 158 cm (5’2″) Nationality: Japanese Instagram: @hinari_festive Twitter: @hinari_festive TikTok: @hinari_festive AMEBLO Blog: @honey-calpis2hononon YouTube: Itokochanz.Hinari Facts: — Her official color is Orange. — She is from Chiba Prefecture, Japan. — Hobbies: Watching TV shows at double speed, collecting lip balm. — Special Skill: Jazz dance, balloon art. — Her cousin is Ruriko. — She’s the oldest member. — She is an original member. — She legally changed her name to Aoba Hinari in January 2014. — Her nicknames are Hinari-chan (ひなりちゃん), Hinarin (ひなりん). — She graduated from FES☆TIVE on October 18, 2024 after 11 years of activity.Note: Please don’t copy-paste the content of this page to other sites/places on the web. membres.nomScene: Takeuchi Saria (竹内さりあ) Birth Name: Mano Saria (真野彩里愛) Position: Vocalist, Dancer Birthday: June 7, 2000 Zodiac Sign: Gemini Blood Type: A Height: 155 cm (5’1”) Nationality: Japanese Instagram: @saria_takeuchi Twitter: @T_SARIA_0607 TikTok: @saria_t1 Saria Facts: — Her official color is White. — She is from Saitama Prefecture, Japan.— Her nickname is Saria (さりあ), Mano-chan (真野ちゃん), Otake (おたけ) — She joined the group on January 19, 2017. — Hobby: Binge eating, eating food available for a limited time. — Special Skills: Stretching her cheeks, table tennis, processing leftover food. — In January 2021, she changed her stage name from Mano Saria (真野彩里愛) to Takeuchi Saria (竹内さりあ). — She graduated from FES☆TIVE on September 29, 2021. — She currently works as an actress and a gravure model.
membres.nomReel: Mano Saria (真野彩里愛) Position: Vocalist, Dancer Birthday: June 7, 2000 Zodiac Sign: Gemini Blood Type: A Height: 155 cm (5’1”) Nationality: Japanese Instagram: @saria_takeuchi Twitter: @T_SARIA_0607 TikTok: @saria_t1 Saria Facts: — Her official color is White. — She is from Saitama Prefecture, Japan.— Her nickname is Saria (さりあ), Mano-chan (真野ちゃん), Otake (おたけ) — She joined the group on January 19, 2017. — Hobby: Binge eating, eating food available for a limited time. — Special Skills: Stretching her cheeks, table tennis, processing leftover food. — In January 2021, she changed her stage name from Mano Saria (真野彩里愛) to Takeuchi Saria (竹内さりあ). — She graduated from FES☆TIVE on September 29, 2021. — She currently works as an actress and a gravure model.
membres.dateNaissance: June 7, 2000 Zodiac Sign: Gemini Blood Type: A Height: 155 cm (5’1”) Nationality: Japanese Instagram: @saria_takeuchi Twitter: @T_SARIA_0607 TikTok: @saria_t1 Saria Facts: — Her official color is White. — She is from Saitama Prefecture, Japan.— Her nickname is Saria (さりあ), Mano-chan (真野ちゃん), Otake (おたけ) — She joined the group on January 19, 2017. — Hobby: Binge eating, eating food available for a limited time. — Special Skills: Stretching her cheeks, table tennis, processing leftover food. — In January 2021, she changed her stage name from Mano Saria (真野彩里愛) to Takeuchi Saria (竹内さりあ). — She graduated from FES☆TIVE on September 29, 2021. — She currently works as an actress and a gravure model.
